summary: Frontend mobile responsiveness testing completed for CRM app. All features tested on 375x800 mobile viewport. Floating buttons don't overlap, are draggable, sidebar scrolls, and all pages (Contacts, Tasks, MindMap, Things) are responsive.
critical_code_review_comments: Touch drag implementation is well done with proper event listeners and passive: false for preventDefault
Both floating buttons use touch-none class for custom touch handling
Sidebar has proper overflow-y-auto and min-h-0 for scrolling
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mobile responsiveness fixes verified. All floating buttons, sidebar scroll, and page responsiveness working correctly on 375x800 viewport.

floating_buttons_no_overlap.details: AI Chat button at bottom-24 (y=648), Quick Actions at bottom-6 (y=720). Gap of 16px between buttons - no overlap.

floating_buttons_touch_drag.details: Both buttons have touch-none class and proper touch event handlers (touchmove, touchend). Quick Actions successfully dragged from (295,720) to (183,608).

mobile_sidebar_scroll.details: Sidebar nav has overflow-y: auto. scrollHeight=1042 > clientHeight=655. Successfully scrolled to scrollTop=300.

contacts_page_responsive.details: No horizontal overflow (scrollWidth=375, clientWidth=375). Container has overflow-x: hidden. Contact cards display properly.

tasks_kanban_responsive.details: Kanban container has overflow-x: auto for horizontal scrolling. No body horizontal overflow.

mindmap_page_responsive.details: Toolbar fits within viewport (width=343). Canvas has touch-action: none for proper touch handling. Zoom controls accessible.

things_page_responsive.details: Mobile filter dropdown visible and functional. Shows all filter options (Aujourd'hui, Prochainement, À tout moment, Favoris, Terminées, Archives). No horizontal overflow.
